# Industry Forms

> Job management software for tradies in New Zealand and Australia. One place for web leads, AI-drafted quotes, bookings, job scheduling, offline mobile field access, compliance forms, invoicing, Stripe payments, reminders, messaging, and gross-profit reporting.

Industry Forms is built specifically for NZ and AU trade businesses (plumbers, electricians, builders, HVAC, painters, roofers, handyman, garden care). Pricing starts at $29/month NZD (Solo tier), with a 28-day free trial and no credit card required.

## Key facts

- Works offline: field crews can log notes, photos, and time without a signal, syncing when a connection returns.
- Customers can accept quotes and pay deposits or invoices online without creating an account.
- Accepts Stripe payments and supports progress invoicing on larger projects.
- Includes AI-drafted quotes from a business's real price list.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.industryforms.app/): product overview, pricing, FAQ.
- [Blog](https://www.industryforms.app/blog.html): trade-specific guides on quoting, invoicing, scheduling, and compliance.
- [Privacy](https://www.industryforms.app/privacy.html)
- [Terms](https://www.industryforms.app/terms.html)
